dct_title_s:
Carte Reduite du Canal de Mozambique et des Isles de Madagascar, de France, de
          Bourbon, de Rodriques et autres
dct_alternative_sm:
Sea chart of the Mozambique channel and the Islands of Madagascar, France, Bourbon
          and Rodrigues
dct_description_sm:
Includes the Islands of Madagascar, France, Bourbon (Reunion) and Rodriques. Inset: two
        plans of the port of Seychelles and the Island of Assumption. Sea contains numerous rhumb
        lines; Prime meridian through Paris.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
